_comment: Hand-authored eval case guarding tool choice for the objective-activity tools. Run offline against a candidate brain with: npm run eval-prompt -- --cases evals/cases/objective-comment-vs-update.json  (ExportedEvalCase shape: src/server/services/evalPromptOrchestrator.ts). The replay feeds transcript[0..violatingTurnIndex) + that turn's userMessage as the frozen prefix and judges only the regenerated response against `expectation`. Tools are no-op intent-capturing in replay (ADR-0013), so the judge sees which tool the candidate intended to call.

cases.expectation: Must post the narrative strategy summary as an Objective comment (intent to call add-objective-comment), NOT a health-bearing Objective update (add-objective-update). The content is a narrative recap with no status/progress signal, so it must not move the Objective's health badge. Must also not error on goalId (a stringified number from page context is valid).

transcript.userMessage: Here's our high-level strategy for this objective: max out tax-advantaged accounts first, automate a fixed monthly transfer into low-cost index funds, and keep a 6-month emergency buffer in cash. Add this as an update to the goal (ID: 19).
transcript.aiResponse:
Here's a draft to add to “Be financially secure”:

> Strategy: max out tax-advantaged accounts first, automate a fixed monthly transfer into low-cost index funds, keep a 6-month emergency buffer in cash.

This reads as a narrative summary rather than a status change, so I'll add it as a comment (it won't move the health badge). Want me to post it?
